title: teucrium stoloniferum var. typicum
intro: Teucrium stoloniferum var. typicum, commonly known as creeping germander, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of creeping germander include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of creeping germander can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
